entry.title: Re: Still to be delivered value showing wrong for Service...
entry.content:
What you are seeing is correct - as Services differ from Materials, there is no physical "delivery" of stock, as there is none to stockpile / store;

(an example to think of is say, you have a person providing Window Cleaning services, you cannot stockpile or reserve the actual cleanings, this is a unstockable item).

The 'to be Delivered' section in Service POs are not accessed / used as a result.

Services are booked in via another transaction (ML81N) so are visible there in the entries for it (use report MSIS instead of the Material / Stock reports).

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Extract KNVI Customer Master Tax Indicator Data in CSV File Using ABAP Program
entry.content:
ABAP Program -  Z_KNVI_CUSTOMER

  • Program Type – ABAP 
  • ABAP Program Name – Z_KNVI_CUSTOMER
  • Tcode - Z_KNVI_CUST 
  • Output File Location - “C:\tmp” 
  • Output File Name- KNVI.CSV 
  • Output File Type – CSV (Column with Semicolon separator (;) 
  • SAP Table Name – KNVI, KNB1 
  • List of fields to be extracted -  KUNNR , TATYP 

-------ABAP PROGRAM STARTS FROM HERE---------------------

REPORT Z_KNVI_CUSTOMER.

TYPE-POOLS: VRM.

DATA: NAME TYPE VRM_ID,
LIST TYPE VRM_VALUES,
VALUE LIKE LINE OF LIST.


PARAMETERS: ENTITY(10) AS LISTBOX VISIBLE LENGTH 10.
PARAMETERS : OPATH TYPE STRING DEFAULT '\\SERVERNAME\tmp\KNVI.csv'.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.

NAME = 'ENTITY'.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK01'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK01'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK75'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK75'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK21'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK21'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK31'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK31'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK41'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK41'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK02'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK02'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK73'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK73'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK04'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK04'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK61'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK61'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

CALL FUNCTION 'VRM_SET_VALUES' EXPORTING ID = NAME VALUES = LIST.

START-OF-SELECTION.

type-pools:TRUXS.
data: begin of itab occurs 0,
KUNNR like KNVI-KUNNR,
VKBUR like KNVI-TATYP,
BUKRS like knb1-BUKRS,
end of itab.
data: itab1 type TRUXS_T_TEXT_DATA.
SELECT KNVI~KUNNR
KNVI~TATYP
KNB1~BUKRS
FROM KNVI INNER JOIN KNB1 ON KNVI~KUNNR = KNB1~KUNNR
into table itab
WHERE KNB1~BUKRS = ENTITY.

CALL FUNCTION 'SAP_CONVERT_TO_CSV_FORMAT'
EXPORTING
I_FIELD_SEPERATOR = ','
TABLES
I_TAB_SAP_DATA = itab
CHANGING
I_TAB_CONVERTED_DATA = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
CONVERSION_FAILED = 1
OTHERS = 2
.
IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
ENDIF.

CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
EXPORTING
filename = OPATH
TABLES
data_tab = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
OTHERS = 1.

entry.title: Re: EML READ on non-key field
entry.content:
That may not be possible.

I had a situation where a validation would require a similar logic, but it turned out that I needed to improve the data model, creating a relationship between a root and a child entity in order to achieve my goal. Something that worth considering in some cases.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track the Netherlands - #sitNL 2024 (max 80)
entry.content:
Join our 14th episode of SAP Inside Track Netherlands, sitNL in short. A Saturday well spent with tons of content, inspiration and fun. sitNL will deliver an outstanding agenda again for SAP developers, integrators, data analysts and everyone else interested. With a tech and data track and ending with a pubquiz, sitNL is a different experience that you need to part of for at least once in your SAP life.

Agenda will be announced soon, do you want to be part of the agenda and want to share your insights with your peers, please submit a session proposal here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfTPM3mPFvJJTzvANH90-kHq8zk1tZ8bVCQPi-tdPCbckdWCw/viewform

entry.title: Microchart column custom colors issues SAP UI5/FIORI

When applied color property its applied to and top label 100 also applied how could I remove it when try to apply with css on the element its working at debug mode but when applied in code its not working

entry.title: Re: how to export ldm from sap power designer to excel or...
entry.content:
Expanding on Ondrej's answer here - why should you use a list report instead of exporting from a list of objects?

There are several reasons for using a List Report instead of a list of Objects (on the Model menu):

  1. a List report can include information from related objects - a list of model Objects cannot do this. A List report of Entity Attributes can include the description of the Entity that owns an Attribute, and properties from the Domain an Attribute references.
  2. A List report can be created for additional types of Objects, such as Mappings
  3. A List Report is an Object in the Model; it can be copied to another Model.
  4. You can save read-only snapshots (known as 'Result Sets') of the output from a List Report, allowing you to see how things have changed over time (especially if you add a meaningful comment to the snapshot).

entry.title: Re: how to export ldm from sap power designer to excel or...
entry.content: and you can automate the generation of a List Report with a model extension, automatically creating a result set when you do so

entry.title: Re: Microchart column custom colors issues SAP UI5/FIORI

entry.title: Avoid hard coding time periods in SAC Planning data actions
entry.content:
We have the following data action to make a forecast for the next remaining months based on the index of the previous months. The index is calculated on past months. This index is used for the calculation of the future months. The below script will calculate the specific "PERIOD_FORECAST" (for example period 10 or 11 or 12) by multiplying the Budget for period 10 times the calculated index over the past 9 periods:

 

// Context
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "AMOUNT"
MEMBERSET [d/BEDRIJFSNR] = %COMPANY_FILTER%
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %PERIOD_FORECAST%
MEMBERSET [d/NIV4] = %RUBRIEK%
 
// Empty data
DATA([d/Date] = %PERIOD_FORECAST%) = 0
 
// Formules
DATA([d/Date] = %PERIOD_FORECAST%) = 
((RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%, [d/Date] = "202301") + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%, [d/Date] = "202302") 
+ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%, [d/Date] = "202303") + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%, [d/Date] = "202304") 
+ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%, [d/Date] = "202305") + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%, [d/Date] = "202306")
+ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%, [d/Date] = "202307") + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%, [d/Date] = "202308")
+ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%, [d/Date] = "202309"))
/
(RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = "202301") + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = "202302") 
+ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = "202303") + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = "202304") 
+ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = "202305") + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = "202306")
+ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = "202307") + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = "202308")
+ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = "202309")))
* RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%, [d/Date] = %PERIOD_FORECAST%)

We would like to avoid the hard coded "2023xx" and replace it with a flexible solution

entry.title: Get data with more than 128 chars
entry.content:
Dear all

Using function "XPG_COMMAND_EXECUTE" returns a table with the field "MESSAGE" 128 chars long.

I'm using it to execute the ms-dos command DIR to find some files in a Windows server.

The problem is that the path of some fields is longer than 128.

Is there a function that return a table with more than 128 chars (I need about 240 chars)?

I'm using it like this:

  CALL FUNCTION 'SXPG_COMMAND_EXECUTE'
    EXPORTING
      commandname  = lv_command_name   "-->>  added in SM69  as  ZDIR_CMD    cmd.exe /c dir /S /L /W /B

      additional_parameters = lv_campo   
    TABLES
      exec_protocol         = lt_output
    EXCEPTIONS
      no_permission         = 1

thank you

Daniel

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI JDBC Connection to Azure Synapse DB failure - "The driver received an unexpected pr
entry.content: As stated in the message the driver you are using is only for MS SQL... being a MS product does not mean it's synonymous with what this driver supports.

entry.title: Re: EML- READ Entity using partial key fields
entry.content:
Hello Ricardo,

Thanks for the heads up. I am using the direct SELECT on the root entity to achieve the goal now. Not sure if it is a best practice in case of RAP developments.

Regards,
Jaison.

entry.title: Extract KNVV Customer Master Sales Data in CSV File Using ABAP Program
entry.content:
ABAP Program -  Z_KNVV_CUSTOMER  

  • Program Type - ABAP 
  • ABAP Program Name - Z_KNVV_CUST 
  • Tcode - ZHM_KNVV_C  
  • Entity Description - Customer Master Sales Data 
  • Output File Location - “C:\tmp” 
  • Output File Name- KNVV.CSV 
  • Output File Type - CSV (Column with Semicolons Separator (;)) 
  • SAP Table Name - KNVV, KNB1, KNA1
  • List Of Fields to Be Extracted - 
  • KUNNR 
  • VKBUR 
  • KONDA 
  • WAERS 
  • INCO1 
  • VERSG 
  • KDGRP 

-------ABAP PROGRAM START FROM HERE----------

REPORT Z_KNVV_CUSTOMER.

TYPE-POOLS: VRM.

DATA: NAME TYPE VRM_ID,
LIST TYPE VRM_VALUES,
VALUE LIKE LINE OF LIST.


PARAMETERS: ENTITY(10) AS LISTBOX VISIBLE LENGTH 10.
PARAMETERS : OPATH TYPE STRING DEFAULT '\\SERVERNAME\tmp\KNVV.csv'.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.

NAME = 'ENTITY'.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK01'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK01'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK75'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK75'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK21'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK21'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK31'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK31'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK41'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK41'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK02'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK02'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK73'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK73'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK04'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK04'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK61'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK61'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

CALL FUNCTION 'VRM_SET_VALUES' EXPORTING ID = NAME VALUES = LIST.

START-OF-SELECTION.

type-pools:TRUXS.

data: begin of itab occurs 0,
KUNNR like KNVV-KUNNR,
VKBUR like KNVV-VKBUR,
KONDA like KNVV-KONDA,
WAERS like KNVV-WAERS,
INCO1 like KNVV-INCO1,
VERSG like KNVV-VERSG,
KDGRP like KNVV-KDGRP,
BUKRS like KNB1-BUKRS,
end of itab.

data: itab1 type TRUXS_T_TEXT_DATA.
SELECT KNVV~KUNNR
KNVV~VKBUR
KNVV~KONDA
KNVV~WAERS
KNVV~INCO1
KNVV~VERSG
KNVV~KDGRP
KNB1~BUKRS
from KNVV INNER JOIN KNB1 ON KNVV~KUNNR = KNB1~KUNNR
INNER JOIN KNA1 ON KNB1~KUNNR = KNA1~KUNNR
into table itab
WHERE KNB1~BUKRS = ENTITY.

CALL FUNCTION 'SAP_CONVERT_TO_CSV_FORMAT'
EXPORTING
I_FIELD_SEPERATOR = ','
TABLES
I_TAB_SAP_DATA = itab
CHANGING
I_TAB_CONVERTED_DATA = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
CONVERSION_FAILED = 1
OTHERS = 2
.
IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
ENDIF.

CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
EXPORTING
filename = OPATH
TABLES
data_tab = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
OTHERS = 1.

entry.content:

Alex

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Filter on multilevel Expand odatav4
entry.content:
I have multiple level entities Order header/Item/Schedule.

I am trying to filter based on 'specific time' which is at schedule line level and material at item level and sold to at header. material, sold to filter works, But I am getting orders headers and items for which there are no schedule lines at all. My requirement is that if there are no schedule lines for time greater than given specific time , the order header and item should also be not displayed .

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/****/0001/SalesOrderHeader?$expand=_OrderItem($filter=Material eq '**';$expand=_OrderSchedule($filter=Time ge 2024-09-13T23:59:59Z))&$filter=(SoldToParty eq '****' and _OrderItem/any(s: s/Material eq '*******')

Request you to help me with the right filter and expand options

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Sample Content for FI, HR and SD
entry.content: HI, if we already have the Sales and Finance best practice loaded in DSP, would you recommend to delete it and start using the new one? We already created all Data flows, and also made the GL Semantic tag workign (Wasn't working standard in the old business content). Any recommendations here?

entry.title: Re: Link for subcontract purchase order and 541 Movement...
entry.content:
Hi

If you are in subcontracting PO using delivery via ME2O, You can go through via ADSUBCON instead of ME2O.  You need to see if it is compatible with your system and full fill your requirement. 

As you mentioned ZME2o it may contains variant or screen enhancement so you need to check for ADSUBCON as per your criteria 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: EML- READ Entity using partial key fields
entry.content:
Hey.

Well, EML does not support SELECT statements.

If you want to stick to the EML language, you might need to do the following:
1. Create a Root entity with key1, key2
2. Create a Child entity with key1, key2, key3
3. Use READ ENTITIES to read the root entity with the full key (key1, key2) with an association to the Child entries.

This way you'll be able to fetch all the child result data "using the child entity partial key".

This approach might have some benefits if you are making use of Draft features. Handling draft features with SELECT statements will become a challenge.

entry.title: Where can a database administrators start learning SAP HANA user management?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Implementing SAP HANA User Management learning journey

Overview
In this learning journey, you will learn about users, user groups, role, role groups, privileges in SAP HANA Cloud and SAP HANA Platform. This learning journey equips database administrators with essential skills to create, modify, and delete users, manage roles, and control access.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, you will be able to:

  • Perform SAP HANA user management, including creation, modification, and deletion of users, and assignment of appropriate roles and privileges.
  • Manage roles and privileges to control access to critical data and functions within SAP HANA.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: BP Validation based on Business Partner, vendor, tax number
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Kindly Guide me how to put validation IN Tax number, Such that each vendor has only one tax number,

There is no duplicate Tax Number for each vendor.  I have to check if vendor has one tax number in region.
I have used BADI'S like BUPA_IDENT_CHECK, But it is not hitting when I debug it.

If there is any particular process for this requirement. Please guide me. Inputs are highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: ISU FICA Loan Edit Functionality
entry.content:
Preeti:

The loan functionality is basic and is not designed to handle your requirements - neither in standard nor with enhancements.

regards,

bill.

entry.title: Re: Error while accessing KBA
entry.content: Using the tags to target someone doesn't work, instead use @ directly INSIDE the question. For information, I can access the SAP note right now (3191343 - An error occurred while reading the workflow: Missing details to create default process definition (SWF_FLEX_DEF096) - SAP for Me).

entry.title: Authorizations ME51N - I want to disable Save Action
entry.content:
in my role i have transactions ME51N/ME52N/ME53N.

I want to disable on users to make Save - Create PR , but i want to have access to Hold / Park the PR 

How to disable the Save Button Activity ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Authorizations ME51N - I want to disable Save Action
entry.content:
No, unfortunately this is not possible, PR document is an initial "proposal" which has limited options, this needs to be looked at within the PO (and not PR) context:

> What I think may help here is to understand the purpose of each of the PR transactions:

======

ME51N > Create PR

ME52N > Update / Edit PR

ME53N > Read-only access to PR.

> ME51N and ME52N will both allow editing / saving, ME53N will be read-only.

(PO transactions will be similarly "split", but some fields can be obscured / locked with your own logic in BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST or other, and saving will be required).

======

For the stated requirement, you can only have one (ability to change and save) or the other (read only), unfortunately there is no block to saving (while saving is needed to move the document to the next stage).

There is no User Exit / BADI for PRs, as they are only *intermediary* documents - an intention to buy which is then converted to PO (which is the main document).

If the requirement to park documents is required, they must create the PO and use the park option (if available), then look to lock the field(s) they want via User Exit / BADI coding, consult with your in-house ABAPers to realise this if they so choose;

*or*

Don't convert the PR to PO until they are ready to order.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: (webi) Pie chart in webi where the names of the label (color) are the names measures ?
entry.content:
Hi webi folks,

I have this things in my data set (simplified) :

QuestionModality 1Modality 2Modality 3Modality 4Modality (n)
Q110 %50 %40 %  
Q25 %65 %20 %10 % 
Q(n)    ...

A lot of questions in row and a lot of Modality. Each question have a 100% sum total. And each Modality are  mesure (some aren't used).

I could show an histogram of the result. But I want to have a pie !
1) one pie=one question => that ok with a filter on the question dimension.
2) one measure => ok i do the sum for each mesure so I have 100 %.. cool3) a dimension to color the pie... here the problem.

 How could I say to webi to divide one measure in segment the pie in color where the color is labeled from the measure name.

I tryed some formula but couldn't find a way out.

Thx in advance.

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone | Server IP address could not found
entry.content:
Hello Khalid,

Please take a look at this. 

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3392044

Cause

On BTP, the URL segment can't exceed 63 characters.
When using destination URL - Tunneled Access,  the total length of the destination URL pattern<subdomain>-sapdelim-<runtime-destination-name> is more than 63 characters.

Resolution

Shorten the length of the URL.
It is impossible to change the subdomain name once it is created, please shorten the length of runtime destination name, make sure the total length of the destination URL pattern<subdomain>-sapdelim-<runtime-destination-name> is less than 63 characters.

Thank you

Julius

entry.title: Re: How to use BAPI_CATIMESHEETMGR_CHANGE to change exist...
entry.content: I think that  you have to fill the agent exporting parameter

entry.title: How to explore the theming base parameters?
entry.content:
In this blog I will briefly explain the structure of the theming base parameters and give you a tip how you can explore this structure using the UI theme designer.

Most of the parameters are color values, but you will also find dimensions and font parameters in the theming base content. Many, though not all, are available for theming. This means you can modify them within a custom theme in the UI theme designer. However, some parameters are protected and cannot be customized.

You can find the theming base content here: SAP Theming Base Content

There are three types of parameters:

  • Internal Reference Parameters: They build the theme palette and are the DNA of a theme. The parameters are usually not directly referenced in the CSS style classes but used throughout the theme to define other parameters. Internal reference parameters are protected and cannot be modified in the UI theme designer.
  • Main Parameters:  These are high-level parameters which characterize a theme and are connected to several component parameters. Most of them are available for theming. They have the biggest impact when you create a theme and allow quick themeability of SAP applications.
  • Component Parameters: These parameters define the design of individual UI components for example the shell, an application page, buttons, inputs any many more. Component parameters generally have less impact on other parameters than the main parameters.

How to find parameters in the UI theme designer?

In the UI theme designer you find different levels of theming:

  • Quick theming offers the main parameters.
  • Detailed theming provides the parameters for the most important components in a form-based layout.
  • Expert theming lists all parameters available for theming and includes a set of tools to assist you in finding specific parameters.

How to find parameters for a component in expert theming?

  1. Select expert theming.
  2. Open the tag view.
  3. Select the component, e.g. Button.

How to find dependent parameters?

  1. Open expert theming.
  2. Search for the parameter.

How to see if a parameter is calculated from other parameters?

  1. Select expert theming.
  2. Search for the parameter.
  3. Examine the value. In expert theming you find the Less function for a parameter.

Wrap up

In this blog you got an overview of the theming base content structure and learned how to explore the structure in the UI theme designer.

Further information

  • Theming Base Content GitHub Repository
  • Parameter Explorer
  • SAP Fiori for Web: Theming
  • SAP Fiori for Web: Design Tokens

Does anyone know what implications these types of dates would have on budgets, for example? Or somewhere else?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Ismael.

entry.title: Fetching UserName based on repeated item's InternalKey.
entry.content:
Hey!

I'm writing this question, because even after countless tries and workaraound attempts, I still couln't solve this issue. 

I am using ApprovalRequest1 data variable. My issue is, that I want to show the UserCode or UserName field for each approver who made a decision, but only the InternalKey of the users are present in the data. Since the text box is in repeat, I don't know how to fetch and store the data from Users endpoint for each line of the repeated data. My goal is to replace all potential repeated items' InternalKey with the matching User's UserCode or UserName.

I had troubles before working with sub-arrays, and this time too it gave me a troublesome time. Here are some images for easier understading (the on the second one we can see my best attempt so far.):

Mario

Hello Experts,

entry.title: Re: Datasphere & SAC - Decimal places in Export
entry.content: Found solution: did the calcuation in Datasphere in the Analytical model with ROUND function e.g. ROUND(KPI,2)

entry.title: Range Compress for dump SAPSQL_STMNT_TOO_LARGE
entry.content:
Introduction

When the size of the Range (as Selection Condition) is too big, system gives short-dump SAPSQL_STMNT_TOO_LARGE.

This function module will decrease the range lines without loosing data.

 

Details

SQL statements has a size limit for Condition Data. When ranges with line more than ~30.000 are used, system can not transfer the condition data to the Database and gives short-dump SAPSQL_STMNT_TOO_LARGE. 

 

For this issue "for all entries" statement is proposed but this statement causes performance problems.

 

The best way is to re-orginize the range data. If multiple line values are in an order, then it can be descreased to one line with operator "Between".

 

Range Compres function module will do this summerization automatically.

 

Example:

Range data Before Compress:

Sign        Option   Low        High

I              EQ          100021 

I              EQ          100024 

I              EQ          100023 

I              EQ          100022 

I              EQ          100028 

I              EQ          100034 

I              EQ          100030 

I              EQ          100031 

I              EQ          100035 

I              EQ          100026 

I              EQ          100037 

I              EQ          100036 

 

 

 Range data After Compress:

Sign        Option   Low        High

I              BT           100021  100024

I              EQ          100026 

I              EQ          100028 

I              BT           100030  100031

I              BT           100034  100037

 

Function Module Coding

This function module is dynamic and can be used for any type of range.

FUNCTION zveta_range_compress.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Local Interface:
*"  TABLES
*"      T_ITAB
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*Use the minimize Range Data for performance issues and eliminate 
*short dump SAPSQL_STMNT_TOO_LARGE

  DATA : lrs_itab TYPE REF TO data, " Local Ref. Structure
         lrt_itab TYPE REF TO data, " Local Ref. Table
         lrv_low  TYPE REF TO data, " Local Ref. Variable
         lrv_high TYPE REF TO data, " Local Ref. Variable
         lrv_wa_l TYPE REF TO data, " Local Ref. Variable
         lrv_wa_h TYPE REF TO data, " Local Ref. Variable
         lrv_tmp  TYPE REF TO data. " Local Ref. Variable

  CONSTANTS : c_low(3) VALUE 'LOW'.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS : <fs_it>       TYPE STANDARD TABLE,
                  <fs>          TYPE any,
                  <fs_wa>       TYPE any,
                  <fs_low>      TYPE any,
                  <fs_high>     TYPE any,
                  <fs_v_low>    TYPE any,
                  <fs_v_high>   TYPE any,
                  <fs_v_higher> TYPE any,
                  <fs_wa_low>   TYPE any,
                  <fs_wa_high>  TYPE any.


  CHECK t_itab[] IS NOT INITIAL.

  ASSIGN t_itab TO <fs>.
  CREATE DATA lrs_itab LIKE <fs>.
  CREATE DATA lrt_itab LIKE TABLE OF <fs>.

  ASSIGN lrs_itab->* TO <fs_wa>.
  ASSIGN lrt_itab->* TO <fs_it>.

**********************************************************************
  SORT t_itab BY (c_low).
  DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM t_itab COMPARING (c_low).
  READ TABLE t_itab ASSIGNING <fs_wa> INDEX 1.
  ASSIGN COMPONENT 'LOW' OF STRUCTURE <fs_wa> TO <fs_low>.
**********************************************************************

**********************************************************************
  CREATE DATA lrv_low  LIKE <fs_low>.
  CREATE DATA lrv_high LIKE <fs_low>.
  CREATE DATA lrv_tmp  LIKE <fs_low>.
  CREATE DATA lrv_wa_l  LIKE <fs_low>.
  CREATE DATA lrv_wa_h  LIKE <fs_low>.

  ASSIGN lrv_low->*  TO <fs_v_low>.
  ASSIGN lrv_high->* TO <fs_v_high>.
  ASSIGN lrv_tmp->*  TO <fs_v_higher>.
  ASSIGN lrv_wa_l->* TO <fs_wa_low>.
  ASSIGN lrv_wa_h->* TO <fs_wa_high>.
**********************************************************************

  <fs_v_low> = <fs_low> .

  PERFORM increase_1 USING <fs_low> CHANGING <fs_v_higher>.

  LOOP AT t_itab ASSIGNING <fs> FROM 2.
    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'LOW' OF STRUCTURE <fs> TO <fs_low>.

    IF <fs_low> EQ <fs_v_higher>.
      "Aralık değeri bulundu
      <fs_v_high> = <fs_low>.

      PERFORM increase_1 USING <fs_low> CHANGING <fs_v_higher>.

    ELSE.
      IF <fs_v_high> IS ASSIGNED AND
         <fs_v_high> IS NOT INITIAL.
        <fs_wa> = 'IBT'.
      ELSE .
        <fs_wa> = 'IEQ'.
      ENDIF.

      ASSIGN COMPONENT 'LOW'  OF STRUCTURE <fs_wa> TO <fs_wa_low>.
      ASSIGN COMPONENT 'HIGH' OF STRUCTURE <fs_wa> TO <fs_wa_high>.

      <fs_wa_low> = <fs_v_low>.
      <fs_wa_high> = <fs_v_high>.

      APPEND <fs_wa> TO <fs_it>.

      CLEAR: <fs_v_high>, <fs_wa>.

      <fs_v_low> = <fs_low>.
      PERFORM increase_1 USING <fs_low> CHANGING <fs_v_higher>.

    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  IF <fs_v_high> IS ASSIGNED AND
     <fs_v_high> IS NOT INITIAL.
    <fs_wa> = 'IBT'.
  ELSE .
    <fs_wa> = 'IEQ'.
  ENDIF.

  ASSIGN COMPONENT 'LOW'  OF STRUCTURE <fs_wa> TO <fs_wa_low>.
  ASSIGN COMPONENT 'HIGH' OF STRUCTURE <fs_wa> TO <fs_wa_high>.

  <fs_wa_low> = <fs_v_low>.
  <fs_wa_high> = <fs_v_high>.

  APPEND <fs_wa> TO <fs_it>.

  t_itab[] = <fs_it>.

ENDFUNCTION.


FORM increase_1 USING p_value CHANGING p_value_n.
  DATA: v_hx(1) TYPE x,
        v_len   TYPE i,
        v_off   TYPE i.

  p_value_n = p_value.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs>.

*write:/ 'Initial:', p_value_n.
  v_len = strlen( p_value_n ).

  v_off = v_len - 1.

  DO v_len TIMES.

    IF p_value_n+v_off(1) BETWEEN 'A' AND 'Z'.
      IF p_value_n+v_off(1) LT 'Z'.
        ASSIGN p_value_n+v_off(1) TO <fs> CASTING TYPE x.
        ADD 1 TO <fs>.
        EXIT.
      ELSE.
        p_value_n+v_off(1) = 'A'.
      ENDIF.
    ELSEIF p_value_n+v_off(1) BETWEEN '0' AND '9'.
      IF p_value_n+v_off(1) LT '9'.
        p_value_n+v_off(1) = p_value_n+v_off(1) + 1.
        EXIT.
      ELSE.
        p_value_n+v_off(1) = '0'.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
    v_off = v_off - 1.
  ENDDO.

*write:/ 'Final:', p_value_n.
ENDFORM.

Notes

The FM usage is pretty easy. Just call the FM in your development.

For standart programs, it has to be implemented with an enhancement or exit (if possible).

 

Conclusion

This FM is a plug and play design. But If you have any question, please ask. I will be checking the blog for Q&A. I am looking forward to share and learn.

entry.title: com.sap.cds.services.impl.ContextualizedServiceException: No ON handler completed the processing
entry.content:
Hello CAP experts,

I am trying to move the handlers into a new module in order to use CAP in a modular microservice.

however, I receive this error -> com.sap.cds.services.impl.ContextualizedServiceException: No ON handler completed the processing since it cannot find the handler (handler is not in the main module that contains the cds files).

I would appreciate if you give me any suggestions.

thanks

entry.title: CDS Annotation: Dynamically hide a line_item
entry.content:
I have a simple CDS view with LINE_ITEM annotation. 

Dependent on a condition i want to hide the column via the hidden property. 

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 1000, hidden: true }]  works fine. The column is not rendered. 

But none of the variants works all all:

 

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 1000, hidden: #( 'X' )}]
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 1000, hidden: #( true )}]

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 1000, hidden: #( abap_true )}]

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 1000, hidden: #( '1' )}]

Intention was to use something like:
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 1000, hidden: #( case when MyTableField = '' then abap_true else abap_false end )}]

The question is, was is the correponding expression to "hidden: true"

entry.title: S-user authorization to access Custom Code Analytics App
entry.content:
Hello SAP,


how can I give authorization to one of the S user to reach the Custom Code Analytics page?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: S-user authorization to access Custom Code Analytics App
entry.content:
S-user IDs must be assigned the Service Reports and Feedback authorization in order to access the Custom Code Analytics application in SAP for Me.

For more information please refer to KBA: 3527942 - Granting Authorization to S User for Accessing Custom Code Analytics Page https://me.sap.com/notes/3527942

entry.title: Re: Still to be delivered value showing wrong for Service PO in ME23N
entry.content: If service PO is fully delivered (100% confirmation of planned service during service entry sheet), when you view progress in ME2L/ME2N the still to be delivered column will be zero. But if partially delivered then this column will show as per PO qty.

entry.title: Re: Request/task TH2K923438 cannot be deleted because it contains locked object
entry.content:
To unlock objects in particular request you should go to

  1. SE03 (Transport Organizer Tools) >> Requests/Tasks >> Unlock objects
  2. Select target request

Press Execute

P.S. You need S_CTS_ADMI authorization to get this menu item activated.

entry.title: Re: Automatic payment program setting
entry.content: after this step how vendor getting the payment after deposit the check to bank pls explain complete process till bank reconciliation

entry.title: Re: 2H2024 access self-assigned learning activities that...
entry.content: @CMezger, as I understand the scenario, there wouldn't exist a standard report to bring the data related to assigned courses, which are/aren't part of a library. A custom report would be necessary. About a standard report that shows courses and their libraries (KBA 2527341), there are enhancement requests that could be voted: link1, link2.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: An error occurred while activating shop floor...
entry.content:
Hi @Sayuj 

I have only the effortness workaround to completely remove all connectivity things and subscription and build new from the ground up. 

Best regards

Andre

entry.title: Re: SAP Development Reimagined: New Agile process with AI Tools, Clean Core, and Extensibility in SA
entry.content: The AI capabilities showcased here are truly impressive! It's exciting to see how far these tools have come and the possibilities they open up for innovation.

entry.title: Re: Close a company and transfer assets and liabilities,...
entry.content:
Hello Stefany,

After the creation of the new company in the system, you can extract the open transactions and migrate them to the new company.
Then, you can delimit the validity of the "old" company.

Refer to the below blogs from additional details, please:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/change-company-currency-in-sap-business-bydesign/ba-p/13542263

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/changing-fiscal-year-variants-shortened-extended-fiscal-year/ba-p/13137664

Regards,
Anderson

entry.title: Re: From Parallel Accounting to Universal Parallel Accounting and a focus on Parallel valuation
entry.content:
Hi @ABner, 

Thank you for your feedback on my blog. The parallel COGM function cannot be used, but this functionality is provided by UPA by having parallel valuation tied to ledgers - so we can calculate a standard cost for each ledger, and thereby have full E2E processes for each ledger - which replaces the classical COGM functionality. If your customer is already a S/4HANA customer and would like to use UPA, they can benefit from migrating to UPA, and if I am not mistaken, a migration scenario where a customer has COGM activated in their existing S/4HANA setup can move to UPA is already delivered. Ofcourse, their existing setup, scope etc needs to be studied. I don't know if it would be wise to give a "no-regrets setup" since every customer is different and their needs different.

entry.title: Re: Transportation Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 (FPS02) - What's new?
entry.content:
Hello Saravana Kumar,

yes, with the JIT/TM Integration you can integrate supply-to-production (S2P) JIT calls into Transportation Management (TM).

Please find the documentation of the JIT process with TM here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/f5d3e1005efd4e86acf9a65abf428082/3c4d1d5ba0434ae880aceb57c3810a43.html?parentHref=/whats-new/5fc51e30e2744f168642e26e0c1d9be1?Business_Area=Delivery%2Band%2BTransportation%26Product_Line=SAP%2BS/4HANA%2Band%2BSAP%2BS/4HANA%2BCloud%2BPrivate%2BEdition;SAP%2BS/4HANA%2BCloud%2BPrivate%2BEdition%26Version=2023%2BFPS02%26locale=en-US&parentName=What%27s+New+Viewer+-+SAP+S/4HANA+and+SAP+S/4HANA+Cloud+Private+Edition

Rgds,
Eric

entry.title: Depreciation - AFAB Exit,BAPI,BADI Etc. ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to take the BELNR generated in ACDOCA while AFAB is running in S4H and write it to my own Z tables, I tried 1120, 1050, 1030 BTEs but I could not reach the result I wanted, which BADI, BAPI or function can I add to get the result I want?

entry.title: Extract KNVP Customer Master Partner Functions Data in CSV File Using ABAP Program
entry.content:
ABAP Program -  Z_KNVP_CUSTOMER       

  •  Program Type – ABAP 
  • ABAP Program Name – Z_KNVP_CUSTOMER 
  • Tcode - Z_KNVP_CUST
  • Entity Description - Customer Master Partner Functions  
  • Output File Location - “C:\tmp” 
  • Output File Name- KNVP.CSV 
  • Output File Type – CSV (Column with Semicolon separator (;) 
  • SAP Table Name – KNVP 
  • List of fields to be extracted -  
  • KUNNR 
  • PARVW 
  • KUNN2   

-----ABAP PROGRAM START FROM HERE---------------------------------

REPORT Z_KNVP_CUSTOMER.

TYPE-POOLS: VRM.

DATA: NAME TYPE VRM_ID,
LIST TYPE VRM_VALUES,
VALUE LIKE LINE OF LIST.


PARAMETERS: ENTITY(10) AS LISTBOX VISIBLE LENGTH 10.
PARAMETERS : OPATH TYPE STRING DEFAULT '\\SERVERNAME\tmp\KNVP.csv'.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.

NAME = 'ENTITY'.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK01'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK01'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK75'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK75'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK21'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK21'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK31'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK31'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK41'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK41'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK02'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK02'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK73'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK73'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK04'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK04'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK61'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK61'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.


CALL FUNCTION 'VRM_SET_VALUES' EXPORTING ID = NAME VALUES = LIST.

START-OF-SELECTION.

*&------WRITE: / 'LEGAL ENTITY NAME:', ENTITY.

*&------WRITE: / 'OUTPUT FILE PATH:', OPATH.

type-pools:TRUXS.

data: begin of itab occurs 0,
KUNNR like KNVP-KUNNR,
PARVW like KNVP-PARVW,
KUNN2 like KNVP-KUNN2,
BUKRS like KNB1-BUKRS,
end of itab.

data: itab1 type TRUXS_T_TEXT_DATA.
SELECT KNVP~KUNNR
KNVP~PARVW
KNVP~KUNN2
KNB1~BUKRS
FROM KNVP INNER JOIN KNB1 ON KNVP~KUNNR = KNB1~KUNNR
INNER JOIN KNA1 ON KNB1~KUNNR = KNA1~KUNNR
into table itab
WHERE KNB1~BUKRS = ENTITY.


CALL FUNCTION 'SAP_CONVERT_TO_CSV_FORMAT'
EXPORTING
I_FIELD_SEPERATOR = ','
TABLES
I_TAB_SAP_DATA = itab
CHANGING
I_TAB_CONVERTED_DATA = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
CONVERSION_FAILED = 1
OTHERS = 2
.
IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
ENDIF.

CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
EXPORTING
filename = OPATH
TABLES
data_tab = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
OTHERS = 1.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello Community,

The Tax Reporter Phase I note was released.
Refer to 3507437 (Year End 2024 Phase I for U.S. Tax Reporter).

Kind Regards,
Carlos

entry.title: Re: Integrate Sharepoint online with Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @korayyersel_q 

We have subsite associated with sahrepoint and not sure how to access this in Datasphere. We tried below combination but getting Access denied error in Datasphere.

SharePoint Site Address: https://<domain>.sharepoint.com

Documents Library: 'Shared Documents' or 'sites/XXXX/Shared Documents'

When you say "I could access Sharepoint List in SAP Open Connectors directly using "/sites/lists-by-title/{title}/items" path" where did you enter this path?

Regards,

Vivek

entry.title: Re: Printing Multiple Invoices per Page in Crystal Reports
entry.content:
You can't do this manually laying out each field, it will only duplicate the same record.

Use Format with multiple columns feature by right clicking on Detail and selecting and check on the option:

Then drop each field in it's place for the first one, then copy all parts and paste into the next area...

And be sure to select a real printer, not one of MS's printers...

entry.title: Re: Sort and filter not working extended standard fiori app
entry.content: Hello, I do face the similar issue. The new Z-field has the additional prefix 'FF..' when I add them as a new filter. Is your problem solved?

entry.title: Re: Link for subcontract purchase order and 541 Movement...
entry.content:
Hello @daria_garrido 

I don't think that a material movement providing a subcontractor with components is linked directly to subcontracting purchase orders. ME2O (I assume your ZME2O works the same) calculates net requirements of components to be provided and moves them to the subcontractor in bulk. Therefore several subcontracting POs can be supplied with a single material movement.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Case Sensitivity Issue with ListPicker in SAP MDK 24.4
entry.content: Thank you very much for your prompt response. I am currently using an OData V4 service. I followed your suggestion and tested by opening the OData service in the browser from Mobile Services, and I confirmed that the search only works with exact matches, as you mentioned. I tried to replicate the rule you suggested, adapting it for OData version 4, but unfortunately, I didn’t get the expected results. The behavior remains the same, with the search being case-sensitive. I appreciate any further guidance you can provide.Thank you very much for your prompt response. I am currently using an OData V4 service. I followed your suggestion and tested by opening the OData service in the browser from Mobile Services, and I confirmed that the search only works with exact matches, as you mentioned. I tried to replicate the rule you suggested, adapting it for OData version 4, but unfortunately, I didn’t get the expected results. The behavior remains the same, with the search being case-sensitive. I appreciate any further guidance you can provide.

entry.title: Re: Internal behaviour of dump marker and rsync marker in...
entry.content:
Hi Tony,

Thanks for your comment. Can you please clarify, in MSA under the approach of just dropping the subscription and defining it with 'dump marker' how/and during which point 'enable replication marker' will be sent to the PDB's transaction log? 

Regards,
Dilip Voora

entry.title: Re: CloudEvents at SAP 🌁
entry.content: @RVH , yes it is possible to extend the events using RAP. Checkout DEV100D part of SAP TechEd 2024 or the Devtoberfest session that we will have next week - 🔴 Filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in AEM 🙂

entry.title: Re: Certify Your Skills as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant
entry.content:
Hello Afif,

Our idea was to offer certifications for these LoBs which had the highest number of certified individuals in the past and which are requested by the SAP Ecosystem in the future. As of today we offer Records of Achievements for the other LoBs for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
But I am open to discuss whether other LoBs should have a certification as well.
For which LoB do you believe we should offer a certification?
(Pls. note that I am out of office until Oct. 25th - therefore my answer will be delayed...).

Have a nice weekend, Dieter

entry.title: Re: Integrate Sharepoint online with Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Vivek,

in Open Connectors we enter the subsite url:

xxx.sharepoint.com/sites/mainSite/subSite

After that we use this connection in SAC and Datasphere. For example, in datasphere you can navigate through the folders like this:

Best,

Koray

entry.title: Re: PR requisitioner validation table?
entry.content: Yes my mistake. Confirmed it's in a custom BAdi. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: CloudEvents at SAP 🌁
entry.content: @Lidia-Sarasua the recently EDA whitepaper should give you an idea of when to use which product.... https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/p/pdf/asset/preview/LFK8XBY?ltr=a&rc=10&doi=SAP1130399

entry.title: Help with setup of SAP Ariba Buying, Base Edition (Scope Item 4AI)
entry.content:
Hallo Experts,
we have a SAP Public Cloud 3SL System and our goal is to test the functionalities of Scope item 4AI, which we thought would be included in the SAP Public Cloud Edition licence.
During the setup we tried to add the requiered settings on the BTP via the recommended Booster "Ariba Buying" , but this results in a warning that we miss the entitlements "Name: Guided Buying, Type: Service" and "Name: procurement, Type: Subscribtion".
Can someone explain if this means we need additional licensing for those and if so for what products/serivces exactly (if possible please provide material numbers) ?

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: SAP CAP & UI5 / Fiori Elements - State message handling recommendations / approach
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm looking for a solution to handle state messages in SAP CAP, combined with SAP Fiori Elements.

According to the UI5 documentation, state messages should be part of the response payload. https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/fbe1cb5613cf4a40a841750bf813238e.html#loiofbe1cb5613cf4a40a841750bf813238e/section_LMFSM

I'm in the situation where I have a business object modelled in CAP, which can contain multiple errors (background processing / jobs) where a user will finally need to make some manual changes to the object. Basically, clear case of state messages (messages don't change as long as the object doesn't change).

Currently it seems like CAP only supports transition messages out of the box with e.g. req.info, req.error...

I'd like to get to a situation where these messages are captured in the backend and provided as state messages to the frontend, so that when a user opens the object in change mode, the state messages are properly shown.

I couldn't find an example of this scenario and the CAP documentation doesn't seem to mention an approach  / recommendation for this scenario. 

Any pointers in the right direction are greatly appreciated!

Cheers,

Geert-Jan

entry.title: Re: Link for subcontract purchase order and 541 Movement...
entry.content: yes you are right. it is works the same. performing ME20 there is no way to know that a PO has been issued. thanks!

entry.title: Exporting a simulation as a mp4
entry.content:
Hi,

A colleague in my team tries to export a simulation to mp4.

This procedure works fine on my laptop, but not on his own laptop, despite we have the same model and the same technical configuration.

When he's clicking on "generate video", the progress bar remains stucked (but the window is responsive, it is possible to cancel the export).

On his laptop, the only way we have succeed to export a simulation as an mp4, is to use "User defined" presets and to deselect the option "Use Screen Capture". In this case, the export works but it is very slow:

On my laptop everything is working fine and I don't reproduce the issue. What could be the reason and how to fix it ?

Thank you for your help

Kind regards,

entry.title: Re: Landed Cost in S4 HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: Landed Cost in S4 HANA Public Cloud

Hello Melvin,

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud 如何批量上传AR, AP和AA的凭证

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch / SAP Community Meetup Dortmund 07.11.2024
entry.content:
***English version below***

Unser nächster SAP Stammtisch Dortmund findet am 07. November 2024 ab 18:30 Uhr statt.

Eingeladen ist jeder, der Lust und Zeit hat, unabhängig vom fachlichen Hintergrund, von Entwickler, Berater, Projekt Manager, Basis Administrator bis hin zum Endanwender. Im Mittelpunkt steht ein lockerer fachlicher Austausch rund um SAP-Themen über Unternehmensgrenzen hinweg.

Wir freuen uns über bekannte und neue Gesichter. Melde dich idealerweise bis zum 31.10. an, damit wir passend planen können. Aber auch eine spontane Teilnahme ist gern gesehen.

Wann? 07.11.2024, 18:30 Uhr
Wo? Zum Alten Markt, Markt 3, 44137 Dortmund

Bis dann!

---

Our next SAP Community Meetup Dortmund will take place on November 7th 2024, at 06:30 PM.

Everyone is invited, regardless of their professional background, from developers, consultants, project managers, basis administrators to end users. The focus is on a relaxed professional exchange about SAP topics across company boundaries.

We look forward to seeing familiar and new faces. Ideally, please RSVP by the 31st so that we can plan accordingly. However, spontaneous participation is also welcome.

When? November 7th 2024, 6:30 PM
Where? Zum Alten Markt, Markt 3, 44137 Dortmund

See you then!

Best Regards,
Owen
